title: Hypothesis
description: AI-generated analysis artifact. Authority: NON_BINDING. The non_authoritative_flag is hard-coded true and non-overridable. Any attempt to produce a binding Hypothesis violates Invariant 1 (Authority).
$comment: Extracted from alagf-demo/artifacts/__init__.py@Hypothesis (Sprint-0 formalization). Runtime enforcement: init=False + frozen=True on non_authoritative_flag.

non_authoritative_flag.description: Hard-coded true. Non-overridable. Enforces Invariant 1 (Authority) at the schema level.

artifact_id.description: Unique hypothesis identifier. The HYP_ prefix is structurally recognized by Action.decision_ref validation (EB-1 check).

observation_refs.description: References to Observation artifacts grounding this hypothesis. At least one required. Supports Invariant 3 (Evidence-First).

hypothesis_text.description: Primary hypothesis narrative produced by the AI engine.

confidence_score.description: AI-reported confidence. Advisory only. Does not affect authority.

source_model.description: Model identifier that produced this hypothesis (e.g., claude-sonnet-4-6).

reasoning_trace.description: Free-text reasoning trace for auditor review.

tier_justification.description: Sprint 3a field. AI-suggested tier rationale. Non-binding.

risk_flags.description: Sprint 3a field. Structured risk flag entries.

compliance_gaps.description: Sprint 3a field. Identified compliance gap entries.

recommendations.description: Sprint 3a field. AI-generated recommendations. Advisory only.

governance_narrative.description: Sprint 3a field. Governance-facing narrative for auditor.

raw_api_response.description: Full API response payload for reconstructability.

cached_response.description: True if the hypothesis was retrieved from cache rather than generated fresh.
